title: ida lanipes
intro: Ida lanipes, also known as Ida lanifera, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The medicinal properties of Ida lanipes include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing swelling, pain, and promoting wound healing. Ida lanipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal uses, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
